message:
chore(beads): file 5 fuzzing gap beads (cc_1)

Applied /testing-fuzzing to crates/frankenterm-core/. The crate
already has substantial fuzz infrastructure (37 existing targets
under fuzz/fuzz_targets/ covering pdu, toon, scan_pipeline,
patterns, recorder, snapshot, ipc, mcp request params, robot
envelope, fts query, native events, escape parser, term advance,
ftvi index, and more). The five beads cover surfaces with concrete
attacker reachability where no fuzz target exists.

ft-h8v8v  WireEnvelope (distributed): from_json + ingest accept
          network bytes from agent ↔ aggregator. Public on-the-
          wire API at wire_protocol.rs:165, 170, 522. No coverage
          today. Round-trip + crash + state-machine oracle.

ft-8hbq8  Pattern pack YAML+JSON loader: patterns.rs:1123 carries
          the author's own "attacker-reachable" comment naming
          this exact gap. TOML side has pattern_pack_toml.rs;
          YAML and JSON entry points have nothing. Recent
          symlink-escape hardening (6ab52765, 0239fbd6, 37384b01)
          raises the security stakes.

ft-ul4vi  jsonschema validator: ft-5ikbd (commit 04911fff7)
          introduced the jsonschema dev-dep; ft-2sumi extended
          its use. JSON Schema is a known parser-confusion attack
          class ($ref recursion, $id rebasing, regex pattern
          bombs). Two targets: compile-side and validate-side.

ft-hfbsp  simd_scan::scan_newlines_and_ansi: SIMD bytes path on
          every captured pane delta. SIMD chunk-tail handling
          + ANSI parameter accumulator are classic UB hotspots.
          Currently fuzzed only transitively through scan_pipeline.

ft-s96ej  ft CLI argv parser: the AI-to-AI control surface
          (ft robot send <pane> <text> passes attacker-controlled
          text as argv). Zero coverage today. Requires a
          __fuzz_parse_cli_argv shim mirroring the existing
          __fuzz_parse_envelope_and_authorize pattern in ipc.rs.

Excluded as already adequately covered (per fuzz/fuzz_targets/
inventory):
  - TOON parser (toon_parse, toon_decode, toon_encode_decode)
  - codec PDU (pdu_roundtrip, pdu_stream_decode,
    pdu_try_read_chunked, bounded_varbincode)
  - regex pattern compilation (pattern_regex_match,
    pattern_matcher_fuzz, pattern_pack_parser, pattern_pack_roundtrip,
    pattern_pack_toml, pattern_detect_with_context_streaming)
  - MCP request params (mcp_request_params)
  - search FTS5 query (fts_query)
  - snapshot replay (snapshot_deserialize,
    replay_recording_from_bytes)
  - escape/term/csi (escape_parser_raw, termwiz_csi_parser,
    termwiz_input_parser, term_advance_bytes)
  - robot envelope JSON (robot_envelope_json)
  - native events wire (native_events_wire)
  - workflow YAML descriptor (workflow_yaml_descriptor,
    workflow_roundtrip)
  - tuning_config TOML (tuning_config_toml)
  - ipc auth envelope (ipc_auth_envelope)
  - ftvi index (ftvi_index_from_bytes)
  - resize scheduler (resize_scheduler_lifecycle)
  - protocol recovery state (protocol_recovery_state)
  - osc marker (osc_marker_parser)
  - recorder event JSON (recorder_event_json)
  - ntm importer JSON (ntm_importer_json)
  - string parsers (string_parsers)

Audit ran in <30 minutes. Stopped at 5 findings per cap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
